message:
test(unit): expand inline tests for runtime_compat, session_topology (+49) (wa-1u90p.7.1)

runtime_compat.rs: +25 tests covering TryAcquireError/AcquireError Debug/Display/Error
trait impls, MutexGuard/RwLockWriteGuard DerefMut edge cases, spawn_blocking,
task::spawn, Semaphore exhaust-all-permits, watch/broadcast channel edge cases.

session_topology.rs: +24 tests covering TopologySnapshot/WindowSnapshot/TabSnapshot/
PaneNode/InferenceQuality/CaptureReport/PaneMapping Debug/Clone/PartialEq trait
impls, serde roundtrips for all node variants, split ratio float precision,
workspace_id default, pane_ids/pane_count on empty, TOPOLOGY_SCHEMA_VERSION.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
